arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold replacement: Conor Bradley, Jeremie Frimpong assessed as Liverpool transfer rumours swirl
arts.sum: The likely exit of Trent Alexander-Arnold to Real Madrid has led to speculation that Liverpool could look to sign Bayer Leverkusen wing-back Jeremie Frimpong.

arts.ttl: Monaco predicted XI v Brest: Mika Biereth and Breel Embolo to continue up front
arts.sum: Mika Biereth and Breel Embolo have struck up a strong partnership since the former’s arrival at AS Monaco in January. The pair are set to once again lead the line,…

arts.ttl: Preview: Gil Vicente vs. Moreirense - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Primeira Liga clash between Gil Vicente and Moreirense, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
